title: Members have View Only on boards
excerpt:
View only capability for boards of members. We often have information that they need visibility on, but should not be revising or adding updates/commentary. 
This is the place to submit your feature request! Before submi…

posts.author: cchu (Catherine Chu)
posts.cookedHtml:
View only capability for boards of members. We often have information that they need visibility on, but should not be revising or adding updates/commentary.

This is the place to submit your feature request! Before submitting a new topic, please search to see if this request already exists and vote on that topic. If submitting a new topic, make sure you included the relevant tags and encourage others to vote on your feature idea. Learn more about how our feature request process here: All you need to know about our new Feature Request process

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Catherine,

Just to confirm, you’d like for this particular board permission to include the option to restrict ability to add updates?

Screen Shot 2023-08-15 at 12.29.24 pm1790×1034 94.7 KB

posts.author: cchu (Catherine Chu)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca! That is correct! It would be great to have the option to restrict the ability to add updates, make any edits to the board. Essentially, no editing permissions only viewing permissions.
